channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: USD/CHF Breaks Wedge Below 0.8000 as US Inflation Misses & Iran Tensions Rise
item.description: Asia session is opening — here is the overnight forex sentiment picture as Tokyo, Singapore and Sydney desks come online. Swiss Franc (CHF) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: CAD Rallies to One-Month High as BoC Hold & Softer US CPI Support Loonie
item.description: New York is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the US session. Canadian Dollar (CAD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.description: London is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the European session. Australian Dollar (AUD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.
